text:
Anzel (エンゼール, Enzēru) is one of five personal guards for Prince Tyson. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 38, Chapter 400 

Appearance

Anzel has pupil-less eyes, a wide nose, and light and dark hair covering his face's right side. He wears the usual black suit and tie of a bodyguard.

Personality

In his roleplaying as Tyson’s little brother, Anzel has a cheerful and sincere demeanor. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

In Tyson’s quarters, Anzel introduces himself as the Prince’s little brother, adding that the two of them are the only ones who know about it. After the rest of Tyson’s bodyguards introduce themselves, Giuliano realizes that they are acting out the characters Tyson likes. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Anzel was possibly introduced in Chapter 375 (the character on the far right). Himoncé, Madwig, and the unnamed guard can be clearly seen. It is possible that both Anzel and Hyuga’s designs were altered for various reasons (e.g., because of their roleplaying for Tyson). Note the similarity of the character’s eyes, nose, and the direction that their hair is parted.
